name: Lang_TPI
description:
Summary Lang Factor for calculating total permanent investment. Recommended values:
     Fluids processing plant: 5.04
     Solids-fluids processing plant: 4.28
     Solids processing plant: 3.97

name: Lang_TCI
description:
Summary Lang Factor for calculating total capital investment. Recommended values:
     Fluids processing plant: 5.93
     Solids-fluids processing plant: 5.03
     Solids processing plant: 4.67
